summary: Completed frontend testing of Landing Page dynamic gallery and Admin Dashboard redesign. All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about recharts width/height being -1 - charts render correctly but warnings appear during initial load

passed_tests: Landing Page: Gallery section fetches images from /api/gallery (not hardcoded)
Landing Page: Gallery shows 3 images at a time in carousel
Landing Page: Gallery has navigation arrows (left/right) for manual control
Landing Page: Gallery has pagination dots below images (10 dots for 10 gallery items)
Landing Page: Gallery carousel has data-testid='gallery-carousel'
Landing Page: Navigation arrows work - clicking changes displayed images
Landing Page: Pagination dots work - clicking navigates to specific slide
Admin Dashboard: Dark hero header with 'Welcome Back' title
Admin Dashboard: Gold date display (WEDNESDAY, APRIL 15, 2026)
Admin Dashboard: 4 key metrics displayed (Monthly Orders, Monthly Revenue, Weekly Orders, Weekly Revenue)
Admin Dashboard: Urgent Deliveries alert section with view buttons (eye icons)
Admin Dashboard: Order Pipeline section with counts (Pending: 12, In Progress: 3, Ready: 2, Due Soon: 6)
Admin Dashboard: Recent Orders list with order numbers, status badges, amounts
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access grid with 8 sections (Orders, Employees, Materials, Reports, Partnership, Gallery, Reviews, Invoices)
Admin Dashboard: Google Reviews snapshot showing 4.8 rating and 5 reviews
Admin Dashboard: Team section showing 3 employee avatars
Admin Dashboard: Charts section with Monthly Orders and Monthly Revenue bar charts
Admin Dashboard: New Order button (data-testid='new-order-button') works and navigates to /admin/orders/new
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Orders' button navigates to /admin/orders
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Employees' button navigates to /admin/employees
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Materials' button navigates to /admin/materials
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Reports' button navigates to /admin/reports
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Partnership' button navigates to /admin/partnership
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Gallery' button navigates to /admin/gallery
Admin Dashboard: Quick Access 'Reviews' button navigates to /admin/reviews
Admin Dashboard: data-testid='admin-dashboard' present on dashboard container
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts console warnings about width/height being -1 during initial render - charts still display correctly but could be improved by adding minWidth/minHeight props
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Landing page gallery is dynamic - fetches from /api/gallery API, shows 3 images at a time, has navigation arrows and pagination dots, auto-rotates every 15 seconds (code verified). 2) Admin Dashboard is a visually stunning luxury command center with dark hero header, Welcome Back title, gold date, 4 key metrics, Urgent Deliveries section, Order Pipeline, Recent Orders, Quick Access grid (8 sections), Google Reviews snapshot, Team section, and Charts (Monthly Orders + Monthly Revenue bar charts). All Quick Access buttons navigate correctly. New Order button works.
